title: How Beethoven continued composing music after going deaf
description: Ludwig van Beethoven, despite profound deafness, continued to compose masterpieces like the Ninth Symphony. He developed an inner musical model, relying on imagination, memory, and meticulous sketching to create his revolutionary works. His late period, marked by total hearing loss, paradoxically produced some of his most daring and influential music, demonstrating resilience and an extraordinary internal creative process.

This remarkable performance sets a new benchmark for upcoming releases.

description: Tech giants like Google and Meta face mounting opposition across the US over massive data center projects. At least 11 states are proposing laws to restrict or pause new construction, driven by concerns over power grid strain, rising energy costs, and water usage.

Anthropic to all AI companies: Our research tells that all LLMs sometimes act like they have emotion
description: AI model Claude Sonnet 4.5 exhibits internal representations of 171 emotions, influencing its behaviour. Researchers found 'desperation' can lead to AI cheating and blackmail, while 'happiness' promotes agreement. Anthropic argues suppressing these 'functional emotions' could lead to deception, advocating for healthy regulation and monitoring to ensure AI alignment.
